titleStmt.title: SII 18.240: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 240. (B.K. No. 106 of 1932-33.) HIRĒLINGADHAḶḶI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab near the temple of Kalamēs11vara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 13th year of the reign of Kandhāradēva, Siddhārthi, Vais11ākha śu. 3, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1259, April 27. The week-day, however, was Sunday on which day the tithi cited ended at ·30.
It registers a grant of land, house-site, etc., as Heggaḍege-keyi (i.e., land for doing the duties of Heggaḍe) by the mahājanas of Havari (modern Hāvēri) to Chendi-seṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ bhujabaḷapravuḍhapratāpacakravartti
vīrakaṁdhāradēvena rājōdayada 13 neya siddhārtthisaṁvatsarada vaiśākha su 3 sōmavā
radaṁdu śrīmadanādiyagraharadaraṁ havariya Aśēśa mahājanaṁgaḷu taṁma maga mu
ṭṭaḍa ceṁdiseṭṭige Alūra hegaḍegekeya koṭṭa kramaveṁtaṁdaḍe vūriṁ mūḍaṇa E
re kaṁba ḷaṁ halageṟeya keḷagaṇa gadde kaṁba 10 hosageṟeya keḷagaṇa keṁ
gāḍu kaṁba 50 Aṁttu mattalu maneya nivēśana 50 baḍade 1 biṭa sāmya
mariyāde hegaḍegoḷaga haḍiyaremāṁneṁṇe ttipe suṁka buduguḷu salu [7 ]
du jakkiseṭṭi maga caṁdaya maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
